items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Questions on Topics 156
items.html: Why is it that when it expands in Hochma, Bina, and Hesed, Tifferet, Hod, and Malchut, it does not expand in Keter, Gevura, Netzah, Yesod of SAG of AK?

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Questions on Topics 157
items.html: Why is it that when it expands in Malchut of SAG of AK, it returns to expand in Keter, and so on and so forth?

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Questions on Topics 158
items.html: Why does the screen of phase two rely on the posterior of Bina?

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Questions on Topics 159
items.html: Why are the ten Sefirot of the Rosh always called GAR, and the ten Sefirot of the Guf are called the “seven lower Sefirot”?

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Questions on Topics 160
items.html: Why is every lower Partzuf considered the phase of VAK with respect to its upper one?
